sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current frames:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'G', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nPlayer:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    before_g = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
    after_g = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
    print(f"\nBefore: {len(before_g)} 'G' frames")
    print(f"After: {len(after_g)} 'G' frames")
    
    before_c = [n for n in before_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] > 10]
    after_c = [n for n in after_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] > 10]
    print(f"Before: {len(before_c)} 'c' frames")
    print(f"After: {len(after_c)} 'c' frames")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
